text.title: JavaScript/TypeScript Test Patterns
text.summary: AAA for JS, async patterns (waitFor, findBy), hooks testing (useState, useEffect), fake timers, and coverage configuration.

section.title: Arrange-Act-Assert in JS
section.rule: Use blank lines to separate the three sections, same as Python.

section.title: Async Testing
section.rule: Always return or await async test functions — silent unhandled rejections mask failures.
Use findBy* queries (async) instead of getBy* + waitFor for elements that appear after async operations.

section.title: Fake Timers
section.rule: Use vi.useFakeTimers() / jest.useFakeTimers() for time-dependent code. Always restore in afterEach.
Call vi.runAllTimers() or vi.advanceTimersByTime() to trigger scheduled callbacks.

section.title: Coverage Configuration
section.rule: Use v8 provider for Vitest (native, fast). Use istanbul for Jest (more detailed branch coverage).
Set thresholds for lines, functions, branches in config — fail CI if they drop.
